column8: Concrete with cobbles and gravels of moderately decomposed granite. (FILL)

Moderately weak to moderately strong, brownish pink, spotted black and white, moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE. Slightly fractured, closely to very closely fractured, joints mainly rough planar. Moderately decomposed feldspars and chlorite stained joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees, 30 degrees-50 degrees, 70 degrees-80 degrees+.
Moderately weak to moderately strong, brownish pink, spotted black and white, moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE.
weak to moderately strong brownish pink spotted black and white, highly to moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE.
